script:
set +e
echo '=== last 2 outbound texts for each recently-active per-user bot ==='
for pair in "afrah:.afrah-bot" "alejandro:.alejandro-bot" "axel:.axel-bot" "cameron:.cameron-bot" "emily:.emily-claude-bot" "gabriel:.gabriel-bot" "rosi:.rosi-bot" "stephanie:.stephanie-claude-bot"; do
  u=${pair%:*}; d=${pair#*:}
  echo "--- $u ---"
  tail -2 "/home/$u/$d/outbound.jsonl" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import sys,json
for line in sys.stdin:
  try:
    o = json.loads(line)
    print(o.get("ts","?"), "|", (o.get("text","") or "")[:80].replace(chr(10)," "))
  except Exception as e:
    print("err",e)' 2>&1
done
echo '=== alejandro errors right after the fix (any post-fix attempts?) ==='
tail -10 /home/alejandro/.alejandro-bot/responder-errors.log 2>&1
echo '=== rosi errors ==='
tail -10 /home/rosi/.rosi-bot/responder-errors.log 2>&1
echo '===END==='
